summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Tenant Permissions System new features. All backend APIs (9/9) and frontend UI tests passed. Dashboard no longer shows Operator Dashboard modal. Team & Roles only visible for operators. Support page has full ticket management system. Ratings page shows correct views for customers and operators.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint working
Backend: Super admin login successful
Backend: Customer login successful
Backend: Operator login successful
Backend: GET /api/ratings/my returns user's ratings
Backend: GET /api/ratings/operator returns ratings for operator's services
Backend: GET /api/support-tickets/my returns user's tickets
Backend: POST /api/support-tickets/ creates new ticket
Backend: POST /api/ratings/{rating_id}/respond endpoint works
Frontend: Dashboard page no longer shows 'Operator Dashboard' modal
Frontend: Customer navigation does NOT include Team & Roles
Frontend: Customer navigation includes: Dashboard, Services, My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, My Ratings, Support, Settings
Frontend: Customer navigation does NOT include: Admin Config, Service Management, Analytics, User Management
Frontend: Super Admin navigation does NOT include Team & Roles
Frontend: Operator navigation INCLUDES Team & Roles
Frontend: Operator navigation includes: Dashboard, Services, Service Management, Team & Roles, Admin Config, My Ratings, Support, Settings
Frontend: Support page shows ticket management system with stats cards (Total Tickets, Open, In Progress, Resolved)
Frontend: Support page shows quick contact options (Call Us, Email Us, Live Chat)
Frontend: Support page shows tabs (My Tickets, FAQ)
Frontend: Support page has New Ticket button and AI Assistant button
Frontend: Support page has floating chat button
Frontend: Ratings page (Customer view) shows: Total Reviews, Helpful Votes, Average Rating stats
Frontend: Ratings page (Customer view) shows 'My Ratings & Reviews' title
Frontend: Ratings page (Operator view) shows: Total Reviews, Avg Rating, Responded, Needs Response stats
Frontend: Ratings page (Operator view) shows 'Customer Reviews' title
Frontend: Ratings page (Operator view) has service and rating filters
Frontend: Ratings page (Operator view) has Respond button for reviews
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx correctly removed Operator Dashboard modal - no modal code present
Layout.jsx correctly implements Team & Roles visibility: only shows for operators with operator_id AND owner/local_admin role
Support.jsx implements full ticket management system with stats, tabs, dialogs, and AI chatbot
Ratings.jsx correctly shows different views based on user role: CustomerRatingsView for customers, OperatorRatingsView for operators
Backend ratings.py has /my, /operator, and /{rating_id}/respond endpoints working correctly
Backend support_tickets.py has /my endpoint working correctly

operator.note: Check 'I'm logging in as a service operator' checkbox

seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant permissions system new features fully tested. Dashboard has no Operator Dashboard modal. Team & Roles only visible for operators (owner/local_admin role). Support page has full ticket management with stats, tabs, AI chatbot. Ratings page shows customer view (My Ratings & Reviews) for customers and operator view (Customer Reviews with respond ability) for operators. All backend APIs working correctly.
mocked_data_note: Ratings and Support tickets show MOCK data in frontend if no real data exists in database. Backend APIs return empty arrays when no data exists.
